_comment: Recorded Builder.io v3 Content API response intended for pass-through emission. The page tree contains a Text component whose first paragraph yields the extracted summary (PRD-206-R10 + PRD-206-R8). The single emitted block is `marketing:builder-page` carrying the raw `data` field as `payload` (PRD-206-R10).

data.description: Welcome to Acme — get started in minutes.
